commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=30f465dd0af1f811225b663bf3cd48de681d4ccd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the bundled Qwen provider to expose qwen3.6-plus on CN Coding Plan, mark it reasoning-capable, remove Coding Plan normalization, and update focused Qwen tests.

PR surface: Source -9, Tests -1. Total -10 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review defects: source shows the PR uses a modelId-only suppression while current normalization and planning require provider/model, and current main still suppresses qwen3.6-plus on Coding Plan. No authenticated Alibaba live request was run in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are maintainer compatibility policy and contributor live proof, not a safe autonomous repair-only path.

target.title: fix(qwen): enable qwen3.6-plus on Coding Plan CN, correct reasoning flag
target.body:
Cherry-picked and adapted from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/69729 (author: wAngByg)

## Summary

- Enables **qwen3.6-plus** on **CN Coding Plan** (coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com)
- Sets `reasoning: true` for qwen3.6-plus catalog entry
- Removes `normalizeConfig` that filtered qwen3.6-plus from ALL Coding Plan endpoints
- Updates `isQwen36PlusSupportedBaseUrl` to only exclude Global Coding Plan (coding-intl)
- Uses `modelId`-only suppression for Global Coding Plan (unverified)

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: qwen3.6-plus was incorrectly suppressed on CN Coding Plan. The CN endpoint (coding.dashscope.aliyuncs.com) supports qwen3.6-plus but the old config normalization and catalog suppressions blocked it on both CN and Global Coding Plan.

- **Real environment tested**: Linux x64, Node.js v24.13.1, pnpm 11.2.2, branch rebased onto latest main (merge=clean, all CI green)

- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
  1. Branch rebased onto latest `origin/main` — merge is clean
  2. `pnpm build` — verified
  3. `pnpm test extensions/qwen/index.test.ts` — 7/7 passed
  4. `pnpm test extensions/qwen/provider-catalog.test.ts` — 4/4 passed
  5. All GitHub CI checks pass (0 failures)

- **Evidence after fix**:
  - CN Coding Plan builds now include qwen3.6-plus in model catalog
  - Global Coding Plan correctly excludes qwen3.6-plus (unverified on that endpoint)
  - `reasoning: true` correctly set for qwen3.6-plus
  - `normalizeConfig` removed — qwen3.6-plus no longer filtered from Coding Plan CN
  - `isQwen36PlusSupportedBaseUrl` uses hostname-based check, only excluding coding-intl
  - 11/11 automated tests pass
  - Code diff: Source -9 lines, Tests -1 line — net reduction, removing dead normalization logic

- **Observed result after fix**: The fix correctly scopes qwen3.6-plus availability: CN Coding Plan includes it, Global Coding Plan does not. The modelId-only suppression in openclaw.plugin.json uses the current manifest format.

- **What was not tested**: Live qwen3.6-plus API call on CN Coding Plan endpoint (requires Alibaba Cloud API key with CN Coding Plan subscription)

- **Proof limitations or environment constraints**: Live vendor API call not possible without CN Coding Plan credentials. However, the code change is minimal (-10 lines net) and the suppression logic is verified by tests covering CN vs Global Coding Plan, Standard CN, and Standard Global endpoints.

---
*Adapted from #69729 by wAngByg | Rebased and tested on latest main | CI: all green*
target.author: zhanxingxin1998
